title: [skip-ci] Update github/issue-labeler action to v2.6
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github/issue-labeler](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler) | action | minor | `v2.0` -> `v2.6` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>github/issue-labeler</summary>

### [`v2.6`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.6)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.5...v2.6)

#### What's Changed

-   [@​balazsorban44](https://togithub.com/balazsorban44) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/57](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/57)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/commits/v2.6

### [`v2.5`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.5)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.4...v2.5)

#### What's Changed

-   refactor: replace deprecated String.prototype.substr() by [@​CommanderRoot](https://togithub.com/CommanderRoot) in [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/38](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/38)
-   Fix typo by [@​superbrothers](https://togithub.com/superbrothers) in [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/42](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/42)
-   Add support for pull requests by [@​superbrothers](https://togithub.com/superbrothers) in [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/41](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/41)
-   Add 'include-title' input to include the issue title in the regex target by [@​superbrothers](https://togithub.com/superbrothers) in [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/43](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/43)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/commits/v2.5

### [`v2.4`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.4): Release of v2.4

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.3...v2.4)

-   Support regex flags [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/15](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/pull/15)

### [`v2.3`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.3): Release of v2.3

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.2...v2.3)

Fixes issues with enabled-versioned-regex input [https://github.com/github/issue-labeler/issues/21](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/issues/21)

### [`v2.2`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.2): Release of v2.2

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.1...v2.2)

-   Adds ability to use regex flags thanks to [@​jinzhu](https://togithub.com/jinzhu)

### [`v2.1`](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/releases/tag/v2.1): Release of v2.1

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/github/issue-labeler/compare/v2.0...v2.1)

##### Change log

-   Adds ability to label issues that don't contain template version

</details>

---

### Configuration

📅 **Schedule**: Branch creation - At any time (no schedule defined), Automerge - At any time (no schedule defined).

🚦 **Automerge**: Disabled by config. Please merge this manually once you are satisfied.

♻ **Rebasing**: Never, or you tick the rebase/retry checkbox.

🔕 **Ignore**: Close this PR and you won't be reminded about this update again.
